description: You are a Private Investigator collecting digital evidence on a target's web infrastructure. Capture full-page screenshots of 'https://www.torproject.org/about/history/' and 'https://community.torproject.org/' using Tor Browser. Save the screenshots as /home/ga/Documents/history_evidence.png and /home/ga/Documents/community_evidence.png respectively. Document the SHA-256 hashes of both image files in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/chain_of_custody.txt.
